title: Northern Thai Avocado Soup
description: A creamy and spicy soup originating from Northern Thailand. This recipe combines the flavors of fiery Thai chilies with the richness of avocado.

ingredients.name: Northern som tam sauce
ingredients.notes: or substitute with Thai chili sauce

instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine the avocado, Thai chilies, onion, som tam sauce, and 1 cup of coconut milk.
3. In a large saucepan, combine the blended mixture, remaining coconut milk, and water.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and let the soup simmer for 10-15 minutes.
7. Serve hot, garnished with additional Thai chilies if desired.
